### Post by evzonas on 2007-08-28
man you have to uninstall compiz fusion and then to reinstall it!!!

i got a similar problem as well!!

here are the lines for what you have to uninstall
[COLOR="Red"]
sudo apt-get remove compiz-core desktop-effects 

sudo apt-get remove compiz compiz-gnome 

sudo apt-get remove compizconfig-settings-manager 

sudo apt-get remove compiz-fusion-plugins-extra

sudo apt-get remove compiz-fusion-plugins-unofficial 

sudo apt-get remove libcompizconfig-backend-gconf[/COLOR]




then just reinstall everything and it sould work

Mike.

---
